# Acupuncture Health Center

> Traditional Chinese medicine clinic in Edina, Minnesota offering acupuncture, Chinese herbal medicine, Tui Na, and cupping. Over 20 years of care, in-network with most major insurance.

## Key facts
- Location: 6545 France Avenue S, Suite C-21, Edina, MN 55435
- Phone: 952-922-5000 (Fax: 952-922-5003)
- Email: acupuncturehc@gmail.com
- Hours (derived from practitioner schedule; verify front-desk hours): Mon 8:30am–5:30pm, Tue 8:30am–5:15pm, Wed 8:30am–6:00pm, Thu 11:00am–6:00pm, Fri 8:00am–2:15pm, Sat 8:45am–2:30pm, Sun closed
- Practitioners: Dr. Huan Ma (TCMD, PhD, L.Ac), Tao Gong (TCMD, L.Ac), Paige Powers (M.Ac., L.Ac)

## Services
- Acupuncture
- Chinese Herbal Medicine (inventory of 400+ herbs and formulas)
- Tui Na (Chinese therapeutic massage)
- Cupping
- Cosmetic Acupuncture

## Conditions commonly treated
- Pain management (back, knee, arthritis, sciatica, migraines, fibromyalgia, carpal tunnel)
- Cardiopulmonary (allergies, asthma, hypertension)
- Genitourinary (dysmenorrhea, PMS, infertility, UTIs)
- Gastrointestinal (IBS, GERD, constipation/diarrhea)
- Wellness & prevention (stress, weight loss, smoking cessation)
- Other (stroke recovery, Bell's palsy, insomnia, anxiety and depression)

## Fees
- First visit evaluation: $45 (one-time)
- Acupuncture session: $85
- Herbal consultation: $52
- Non-insurance package: 8 treatments for $600 ($75 each)
- In-network with most major insurance; HSA/FSA accepted
